questions.q: In which year was the Hindi film Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge released?
questions.explanation: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge was released on 20 October 1995.

questions.q: Who plays the male lead Raj Malhotra in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan plays Raj Malhotra in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: Who plays the female lead Simran in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
questions.explanation: Kajol plays Simran Singh in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: Who directed Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge, marking his directorial debut?
questions.explanation: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge was the directorial debut of Aditya Chopra.

questions.q: Which production house produced Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
questions.explanation: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge was produced by Yash Raj Films.

questions.q: At which Mumbai cinema has Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge run for an exceptionally long period since 1995, the longest theatrical run in Indian cinema?
questions.explanation: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge has had its record-long theatrical run at Mumbai's Maratha Mandir cinema since 1995.

questions.q: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge popularised the template of romances centered on which kind of expatriate Indian characters?
questions.explanation: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge defined the NRI (Non-Resident Indian) romance template in Hindi cinema.

questions.q: In Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge, where do Raj and Simran first meet and fall in love?
options: During a Eurail trip across Europe
questions.explanation: Raj and Simran fall in love during a Eurail trip across Europe in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: In which country are Raj and Simran's families based at the start of Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
questions.explanation: Both Raj's and Simran's families live in London, England, at the start of Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: Which veteran actor plays Simran's stern father, Baldev Singh, in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
questions.explanation: Amrish Puri plays Simran's father Baldev Singh in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: Which music director duo composed the songs for Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
questions.explanation: The music of Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge was composed by the duo Jatin-Lalit.

questions.q: Which song from Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge features the famous lyric 'Mehndi laga ke rakhna, doli saja ke rakhna'?
questions.explanation: 'Mehndi Laga Ke Rakhna' is a celebrated pre-wedding song from Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: Who wrote the lyrics for the songs of Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
questions.explanation: Anand Bakshi wrote the lyrics for the songs of Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: The romantic duet 'Tujhe Dekha To Ye Jaana Sanam' from Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge was sung by Kumar Sanu and which female playback singer?
questions.explanation: 'Tujhe Dekha To Ye Jaana Sanam' was sung by Kumar Sanu and Lata Mangeshkar.

questions.q: At the 1996 Filmfare Awards, which top honour did Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge win?
questions.explanation: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge won the Filmfare Award for Best Film in 1996.

questions.q: In Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge, instead of eloping, Raj insists on doing what before he and Simran can be together?
options: Winning Simran's father's approval and blessing
questions.explanation: Raj refuses to elope and insists on earning the approval and blessing of Simran's father in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: Which actress plays Simran's mother, Lajjo, in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
questions.explanation: Farida Jalal plays Simran's mother Lajjo in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: The Punjab wedding sequences and mustard fields of Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge are set in which region of India?
options: Punjab and surrounding north Indian countryside
questions.explanation: The second-half wedding and mustard-field scenes of Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge are set in Punjab's countryside.

questions.q: Whom is Simran engaged to be married to in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge, against her wishes?
options: Kuljeet, the son of her father's friend
questions.explanation: Simran is betrothed to Kuljeet, the son of Baldev's friend, in an arranged match in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge marked which pairing of Shah Rukh Khan and Kajol, who went on to become a celebrated screen couple?
options: One of their early and most iconic pairings
questions.explanation: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge is one of the early, iconic pairings of Shah Rukh Khan and Kajol, who later starred together in several hit films.

questions.q: Which actor plays Raj Malhotra's warm, fun-loving father in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
questions.explanation: Anupam Kher plays Raj's affectionate father, Dharamvir Malhotra, in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: Which famous closing line, spoken by Baldev to Simran at the train station, is associated with the climax of Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
options: 'Jaa Simran jaa, jee le apni zindagi'
questions.explanation: At the climax, Baldev releases Simran's hand saying 'Jaa Simran jaa, jee le apni zindagi' in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: Aditya Chopra developed Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge with which collaborator, who is credited on the film's dialogues?
questions.explanation: Javed Siddiqui collaborated with Aditya Chopra on the dialogues of Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge, contributing lines such as 'Bade bade deshon mein...'.

questions.q: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge swept the 1996 Filmfare Awards with a then-record haul of how many trophies?
questions.explanation: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge won 10 Filmfare Awards in 1996, a record at the time.

questions.q: Aditya Chopra has said he originally envisioned the lead role in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge for which Hollywood star before reshaping it for Shah Rukh Khan?
questions.explanation: Aditya Chopra has said he initially imagined the lead as an English-language story with Tom Cruise, before reworking it into an NRI romance with Shah Rukh Khan as Raj.

questions.q: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge won the National Film Award in which category?
options: Best Popular Film Providing Wholesome Entertainment
questions.explanation: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge won the National Film Award for Best Popular Film Providing Wholesome Entertainment.

questions.q: Which actor plays Kuljeet, the boorish fiancé Simran is meant to marry in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
questions.explanation: Parmeet Sethi plays the arrogant fiancé Kuljeet in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: Which actress plays Preeti, Kuljeet's sister who is sweet on Raj in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
questions.explanation: Mandira Bedi plays Preeti, Kuljeet's sister, in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: In 2017, a bronze statue of which two characters from Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge was unveiled in Leicester Square, London?
questions.explanation: A bronze statue of Raj and Simran from Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge was unveiled in London's Leicester Square in 2017 to honour the film's legacy.

questions.q: The iconic train-platform reunion of Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge popularised which gesture, with Raj extending a hand to pull Simran aboard the moving train?
questions.explanation: The climax of Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge features Raj's outstretched hand reaching out to pull Simran onto the moving train, an enduring image of Hindi cinema.
